items.name: Turtle's Paradise Flyer #1
items.notes: First of six flyers. Widely listed as missable once you leave Midgar.

items.name: Enemy Skill Materia
items.notes: First of four Enemy Skill materia in the game. Gone once you leave the tower.

items.name: Elemental Materia
items.location: Shinra HQ — Fl.62, Mayor Domino's password
items.notes: Guess the password (or bribe the deputy) before leaving the tower.

items.name: Aerith — Limit Lv.2 & 3
items.location: Earned in battle with Aerith in the party
items.notes: Hard deadline — she leaves the party after the Temple of the Ancients.

items.name: Mythril
items.location: Sleeping Man's cave near Junon (Buggy required)
items.notes: Battle-count trick; trade it at the Weapon Seller's house for Great Gospel.

route.why: Grab it as soon as the Buggy can reach the cave

items.name: Great Gospel
items.notes: Aerith's final Limit Break. Same deadline as her other limits.

route.why: Trade the Mythril before the Temple — it is gone after

items.name: Fort Condor — early skirmish reward
items.notes: Battles expire as the story advances (window approximate).

route.why: Cheap reward now; the battle expires quietly

items.name: Recruit Yuffie
items.notes: Skippable but never missable. Answer her questions carefully.

items.name: Recruit Vincent
items.notes: Crack the safe, beat Lost Number, talk to him in the basement.

items.name: Odin Materia
items.notes: Drops from Lost Number, the safe boss.

items.name: Beta (Enemy Skill)
items.notes: Brutal fight this early; one of the best pickups in the game.

route.why: Painful now, pays off for two discs

items.name: Titan Materia
items.notes: Sitting in the open by the reactor.

items.name: Wutai — Pagoda of the Five Gods
items.notes: Yuffie's personal questline; Leviathan is the reward.

items.name: Bahamut Materia
items.location: Temple of the Ancients — Red Dragon fight
items.notes: The temple collapses after the story sequence — pick it up during the visit.

items.name: Alexander Materia
items.location: Great Glacier — touch the hot springs, then beat the Snow woman
items.notes: Awkward to return to the glacier later — treat it as a one-shot window.

items.name: Neo Bahamut Materia
items.notes: Lying on the ground inside the maze; no return trip.

items.name: The Highwind
items.notes: Free flight. The endgame opens up here.

route.why: Everything below assumes free flight

items.name: Chocobo Lure Materia
items.notes: Buy at least one; equip it to encounter chocobos at tracks.

route.why: No lure, no chocobos — buy it on the way in

items.name: Rent 6 Chocobo Stables
items.location: Chocobo Farm — talk to Choco Billy
items.notes: 10,000 gil each. You need room for parents, babies, and the gold.

route.why: Breeding needs the stable space up front

items.name: 3 Carob Nuts
items.location: Steal from Vlakorados near Bone Village
items.notes: One per colored breeding step. The Gold Saucer sells one for 500 GP as a fallback.

route.why: Each colored chick costs a nut — stock up once

items.name: Good Chocobo (female)
items.notes: Catch with a Wonderful/Good rating per Choco Billy.

route.why: First parent of the blue/green pair

items.name: Great Chocobo (male)
items.notes: Second parent. Feed both plenty of greens before racing.

route.why: Second parent of the blue/green pair

items.name: Race the pair to Class B
items.notes: Higher-class parents dramatically improve breeding odds.

route.why: Class B parents before the first Carob breed

items.name: Blue (River) Chocobo
items.location: Breed Good × Great with a Carob Nut
items.notes: Save before breeding; reload until the color lands.

route.why: Half of the black chocobo pair

items.name: Green (Mountain) Chocobo
items.location: Breed Good × Great with a Carob Nut
items.notes: Needs opposite sex to the blue — reload until you get the pair.

route.why: Other half of the black chocobo pair

items.name: Race blue & green to Class A
items.notes: Both colored birds should hit Class A before the next breed.

route.why: Class A colors before breeding the black

items.name: Black Chocobo
items.location: Breed Blue × Green with a Carob Nut
items.notes: Can cross rivers and mountains — and is half of the gold pair.

route.why: Parent of the gold

items.name: Race the black to Class S
items.notes: A Class S black plus a Wonderful partner all but guarantees the gold.

route.why: Stack the odds before the final breed

items.name: Zeio Nut
items.location: Steal from Goblin — Goblin Island (northeast sea)
items.notes: The gold breed needs this specific nut.

route.why: The gold breed consumes exactly one

items.name: Gold Chocobo
items.location: Breed Black × Wonderful with the Zeio Nut
items.notes: Crosses everything. The key to Round Island.

route.why: The only way to reach Round Island

items.name: Knights of the Round
items.location: Round Island — northeast corner of the map
items.notes: The strongest summon in the game. Master it for a second via Bugenhagen? Later problem.

route.why: The whole point of the gold bird

items.name: W-Summon Materia
items.notes: Expensive but doubles KotR casts against the superbosses.

route.why: Pairs with KotR for the Weapon fights

items.name: HP Absorb Materia
items.notes: Link with KotR: thirteen hits of healing per cast.

route.why: KotR + HP Absorb is the superboss sustain loop

items.name: Emerald Weapon
items.notes: Underwater materia removes the 20-minute timer. Bring KotR + W-Summon + HP Absorb.

route.why: The loadout is ready — go hunting

items.name: Ruby Weapon
items.notes: Appears after the Weapons stir. Knock out two allies before it surfaces its tentacles.

route.why: Last checkmark before the finale
